headline: Why Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of insurance brokerage firm Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) jumped 4.6% in the afternoon session after an analyst at Mizuho maintained a positive "Outperform" rating on the shares.
